description: Jentic provides an agent integration layer for discovering and executing APIs and workflows with managed authentication and an open catalog of agent-ready API specifications. Its platform also includes tools for workflow execution and API AI-readiness scoring.
summary: Jentic exposes a remote MCP server at `https://api.jentic.com/mcp` plus two documented CLIs: Arazzo Runner and API Scorecard. The MCP server supports OAuth (recommended) or a Jentic Agent API key; CLI auth is not clearly documented.
